folders.name: Monstrum Libri Vol. 2 - Aquatic and Desertic

documents.name: Axolotilte
documents.folder: Monstrum Libri Vol. 2 - Aquatic and Desertic

identity.description: Tiny amphibious lake and river creature with a constant appetite, cheerful emotional energy form, and a dangerous hulking alternate form when denied food.

source.book: Anime 5E Monstrum Libri Volume 2: Aquatic and Desertic

combat.defenseSummary: AC 18; HP 13 (5d2+5); Diminutive body, AC Bonus, Resilient (Atmosphere), Water Speed, and substantial susceptibility to standard damage.
combat.offenseSummary: Claws +5 for negligible slashing damage in normal form; Alternate Form can become a Hulking Hangry Axol with extra HP, Huge size, and stronger claws.

system.statBlock:
Source: Anime 5E Monstrum Libri Volume 2: Aquatic and Desertic, PDF p. 18.

Attributes: AC Bonus 6; Alternate Form 7 (Hulking Hangry Axol); Change State 1 (positive emotion, 3/day); Combat Mastery 6; Resilient 1 (Atmosphere); Unique Attribute 3 (Small, light, and unobtrusive); Water Speed 2; Weapon 1 (Claws).

Defects: Easily Distracted 2 (Food); Degraded 8 (Strength); Impaired Manipulation 2; Impaired Speech 2; Limited Damage 6; Obstacle 4 (Strength dice rolls); Slow 3; Susceptible 6.

Points: 17 Attribute/Defect subtotal + 11 Base + 56 Abilities = 84.

notes.overview: Sorrow axolotilte become negative emotions rather than positive ones and can be identified by fewer tines on their six pseudo-horns.

source.book: Anime 5E Monstrum Libri Volume 2: Aquatic and Desertic
